title: DeleteOutput
description: NDJSON output for a completed delete operation.

bytes.description: File size in bytes before deletion.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings about backup flag combinations that had no effect (v0.1.28 GAP-CLI-SURFACE-DRIFT), e.g. --keep-backup is redundant for delete because deletion backups are always preserved. Field is omitted entirely when there is nothing to warn about (skip_serializing_if empty), so it is intentionally absent from required.
